name: YorunoBrowser Official Source
subtitle: Welcome to Underground Apps Hub. Made for me and you.

apps.name: YorunoBrowser
apps.subtitle: HLS/MP4/ImageBulk downloader, OneHanded UI.
apps.localizedDescription:
YorunoBrowser is a one-handed iOS browser and file manager built for late-night browsing and media saving.

Features:
• HLS / MP4 / bulk image downloading with a single tap
• Forced dark mode (Smart / All-invert)
• Ad blocker with per-site exceptions
• Popup & transparent overlay blocker
• One-handed UI — gestures and controls consolidated at the bottom
• Tab groups
• Built-in file manager with list/grid views, sorting, and file conversion
• LikeTime timestamps — jump to favorite scenes in video/audio
• SelectToSearch — search selected text with custom keywords
• Pitch correction / voice changer removal (bulk)

Subscription plans: Free (10 DL/day) / Standard / Pro / Premium / Supporter

versions.localizedDescription:
Performance & Battery 

This update is focused entirely on making the browser lighter, cooler, and easier on your battery.
- Major CPU usage reduction. Fixed an issue where the browser kept the CPU running at high load (60–90%) even when sitting idle on a single
tab, causing noticeable device heating. Idle and general browsing CPU usage is now dramatically lower and stable.
- Cooler device, longer battery. With the CPU no longer spinning in the background, the device stays much cooler during use and battery drain
is significantly improved.
- Smoother UI. Eliminated unnecessary redraws across the address bar and browser view, so the interface feels more responsive.
- Lighter new tabs. Opening a new tab no longer keeps a hidden page running in the background.
No new features and no changes to your settings or data — just a faster, cooler, more efficient YorunoBrowser.

1. Performance & Stability Optimizations
CPU Usage Reduction: Optimized to allow CPU usage to drop below 5%.
Thumbnail Generation & Thread Fixes: Fixed the infinite concurrent thumbnail generation in ContentGrid and resolved the issue where loadItems() would freeze/occupy the main thread.
Thumbnail Loop & Overheating Fix: Fixed a bug in ContentGrid where failing to display thumbnails caused an infinite loop, which led to smartphone overheating.
Background Audio Playback: Audio will no longer stop playing when switching tabs.
2. New Features & Content Control
Redirect Prevention (stopRedirect): Added a stopRedirectToggle next to the AdCleanerToggle. When turned ON, automatic page redirects are blocked, and a manual button to proceed is displayed instead.
Playback End Action: Added a PlaybackEndAction button next to "Close" in the ContentViewer, allowing users to choose between next, stop, or loop when a video ends.
Folder Hiding Feature: Added the ability to hide specific folders from the ContentGrid. You can select a folder in Explorer and tap the "slashed eye icon" in the top right to hide it.
Page Indicator: Added a Page Indicator to the ContentViewer.
3. Ad Blocker & Premium Plan Updates
Ad-Block Links: Added links related to ad-blocking features.
Ad Cleaner Toggle (AdCleanerToggle): Added this toggle above the address bar. For Free/Standard plans, changes last for the current session only; for higher plans, the state is saved permanently in settings.
4. UI, Design & Feedback Enhancements
Extra Dim Mode (darkerToggle): Added a darkerToggle to both browserView and ContentViewer, allowing users to make the screen even darker than standard dark mode.
Default Theme Color: Changed the DefaultThemeColor to Orange.
New App Icons: Added new icon variations (nena Orange / Pink).
Haptic/Operation Feedback: Added sensory feedback when changing volume and brightness.
Layout Layout/Padding Fix: Fixed a layout bug on the initial Files/Explorer page where the vertical padding (Padding.y) became abnormally large when the MiniPlayer was active.
Force Dark Mode Clean-up: Removed redundant/unnecessary filters from the ForceDarkMode feature.
5. File Formats & Detection Expansion
.ts File Thumbnail Support: The browser now generates thumbnails for .ts files in bulk when the HLS server is running (such as during content playback).
Expanded ImageBulk Detection: Expanded the detection range for ImageBulk to recognize more images.
6. Licensing & Localization
License Migration: Migrated the license management to GitHub and updated it.
Multi-language Support: Added official support for Japanese, French, German, and Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant).

news.caption: YorunoBrowser 1.2 Performance Update Released!
news.title: YorunoBrowser 1.2 Performance Update Released!
news.content: We are thrilled to announce the release of YorunoBrowser version 1.2, focused entirely on performance and battery optimizations! This update brings significant improvements to make your browsing experience smoother, cooler, and more efficient. Key highlights include a major reduction in CPU usage, which allows it to drop below 5%, eliminating the issue of high CPU load (60–90%) even when idle on a single tab. This results in a much cooler device and significantly improved battery life. Additionally, we have optimized the UI for smoother responsiveness and made new tabs lighter by preventing hidden pages from running in the background. We highly recommend updating to enjoy these performance enhancements. Thank you for your continued support!

news.caption: YorunoBrowser 1.1 Update Released!
news.title: YorunoBrowser 1.1 Update Released!
news.content: We are excited to announce the release of YorunoBrowser version 1.1! This update includes significant performance optimizations, new features, and various bug fixes to enhance your browsing experience. Key highlights include CPU usage reduction, new content control options, an improved ad blocker, and expanded file format support. We highly recommend updating to enjoy these improvements. Thank you for your continued support!
